ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., in development, deployed) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework used (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this metric relates to */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* Training loss value */,
  "train_AUC" REAL /* Training area under the curve */,
  "train_CC" REAL /* Training correlation coefficient */,
  "train_NSS" REAL /* Training normalized scan statistic */,
  "train_KLDiv" REAL /* Training Kullback-Leibler divergence */,
  "train_SIM" REAL /* Training similarity index */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Specific iteration or epoch of training */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken for the training iteration */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "data_split" TEXT /* Data split used (e.g., 80/20, 70/30) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this metric relates to */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* Testing loss value */,
  "test_AUC" REAL /* Testing area under the curve */,
  "test_CC" REAL /* Testing correlation coefficient */,
  "test_NSS" REAL /* Testing normalized scan statistic */,
  "test_KLDiv" REAL /* Testing Kullback-Leibler divergence */,
  "test_SIM" REAL /* Testing similarity index */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Specific iteration or epoch of testing */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken for the testing iteration */,
  "data_split" TEXT /* Data split used (e.g., 80/20, 70/30) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_roles" (
  "user_project_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's role in the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's role in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_roles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Specific iteration or version number */,
  "model_size" REAL /* Size of the model file */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Total time taken for training this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this comment relates to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this parameter relates to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Specific iteration or version the parameter is associated with */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this visualization relates to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., ROC curve, confusion matrix) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Specific iteration or version the visualization is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_visualizations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this analytic relates to */,
  "avg_train_AUC" REAL /* Average training AUC across iterations */,
  "avg_test_AUC" REAL /* Average testing AUC across iterations */,
  "best_train_loss" REAL /* Best training loss recorded */,
  "best_test_loss" REAL /* Best testing loss recorded */,
  "total_iterations" INTEGER /* Total number of iterations for the model */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., staging, production) */,
  "deployed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "score" REAL /* Evaluation score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
